markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, new initiatives, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Analytics Blocked:** GA4 is misconfigured, reporting only 3 blog URLs. This blocks Looker performance analysis and requires Katya to get admin access to fix.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**New Content Pipeline:** The Go-to-Market Engineering team is providing technical content ideas, enabling Understory to target high-volume keywords and expand into niche topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [**Podcast Strategy:** Podcast articles will be published to the main blog page next week to gain early performance signals, with a dedicated subpage planned for later.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [**Landing Page Project:** Understory will quote a new project for landing page improvements (optimizing existing, building new for RevOps), as this is outside the current scope.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

## Topics

### Analytics & Technical Issues

  - [**GA4 Misconfiguration:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [**Problem:** GA4 reports only 3 blog URLs, blocking Looker performance analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [**Cause:** Likely a residual issue from the old `/post` vs. `/blog` URL structure.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya needs admin access to fix.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**Google Search Console Errors:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Problem:** 125 pages are unindexed, including 404s and other errors.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya will have the Raise team investigate and resolve.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [**Performance Context:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [A mid-October engagement dip was caused by sitemap errors.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [Fixing the sitemap → Google traffic now accounts for \>50% of all sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [**Metrics Defined:** Impressions (seen in search) vs. Clicks (visited) vs. Sessions (time on page) vs. Engaged Sessions (\>10s on page).](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)

### Content Strategy & Pipeline

  - [**New Content Ideas:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [The Go-to-Market Engineering team will provide technical concepts for blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Ideas expected by EOW or early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya will use these to target high-volume keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [**Podcast Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [**Goal:** Publish 2–3 articles next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Articles will be published to the main blog page with a "Podcast" category tag to gather early performance signals. A dedicated subpage is a future consideration.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [**Technical:** The Raise team is adding code to embed YouTube videos.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [**Workflow Automation (Atlas Upgrade):**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
      - [**Goal:** Improve content speed and accuracy with more advanced agents.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
      - [**Potential Change:** Auto-staging content in Sanity, reducing the need for Google Doc reviews. Katya will propose a new workflow next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)

### Website & Design Updates

  - [**Image Mock-ups:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [**Feedback:** The "gears" concept is the preferred aesthetic.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya will provide feedback to the design team to refine the style and ensure future images are more relevant to article content.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [**Website Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [**Completed:** Google Tag Manager added; empty "premium content" CTA removed.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [**Action:** Add Spotify icon and link to the site footer.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

### New Project: Landing Pages

  - [**Request:** Understory to help improve existing landing pages and build new ones.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [**Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
      - [Improve existing Go-to-Market Engineering and Paid Media pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
      - [Build a new page for RevOps as a Service.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
      - [Add variations (e.g., "Paid Media Plus").](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [**Action:** Katya will confirm if this is an add-on service and provide a quote.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
      - [Grant Ali & Alex access to the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [Investigate and resolve the 125 unindexed pages in Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [Fix the GA4 misconfiguration once admin access is granted.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [Add the Spotify icon and link to the website footer.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
      - [Propose a new content workflow using Sanity next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
      - [Confirm if the landing page project is an add-on service and provide a quote.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [**Ali & Alex:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [Grant Katya admin access to Google Analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [Create author profiles in Sanity to be assigned to upcoming thought leadership pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [**Alex:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [Record voice notes for the free trial nurture email.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**GTM Engineering Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [Compile and send technical content ideas to Katya.](https://fathom.video/share/Ss2HB5rGss1sV4x9T8us3U7zcp6rC8dh?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
